data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding peak vs off-peak booking windows.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Peak vs off-peak booking windows' requirement. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the implementation or validation of this specific requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for peak vs off-peak booking windows but lacks concrete evidence of its functionality, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of peak vs off-peak booking windows.
